title: Super Mario Bros. 3 NES 1/26!!!
description:
Part 2- http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VDq8x5Iz0YU&feature=autoplay&list=PL0E4132BC49557638&lf=view_all&playnext=1

This is really a complete run of a wonderful game that gave me so much pleasure when I was younger! Through this, I will show you a lot of the secrets of the game, not all of them, but the main ones for sure... I wanted to record this run for all the lovers of this classic!!! My playing isn't perfect, but I think I did a good job with it! I hope you enjoy it! ;)

World: 1-1,1-2,1-3,1-4,Fortress.

To transform Hammer Brother into a Coin Ship, you have to get (at the end of a Stage) an amount of money with two identical numbers. Examples:11,22,33,44,55,66,77, 88,99. And, you have to break rocks to get your second last score number be the same as the number you got for your coins. Ex: If 99 coins, your score can be 110890 points, and not 110880 points for example. and, you must hit the Cube at the end of the stage when the time is a pair number finishing by:0,2,4,6 or 8. It only works in worlds 1,3,5,6. ;)

To get the Secret White Mushroom Shop House to appear, you must get almost if not all coins in World 1-4. Remember the music, since all stages with this music work the same! There is one of those stages per world. (Worlds 1 to 7 included)
